mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO join_task_result (join_task_id, account, account_id, link, status, reason, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{r.joinTaskId}, #{r.account}, #{r.accountId}, #{r.link}, #{r.status}, #{r.reason}, #{r.createdAt}, #{r.updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM join_task_result WHERE join_task_id = #{joinTaskId} ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM join_task_result WHERE join_task_id = #{joinTaskId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE join_task_result SET status = 'SUCCESS', reason = '', group_jid = #{groupJid}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
